# Drms

**Summary**: A quasi-non-destructive technique that measures the resistance encountered during the drilling of small diameter holes.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022]] used DRMS to measure drilling resistance and evaluate the strengthening effect of chemical treatments.

## Key Results and Findings

- DAP treatment resulted in up to 20% increase in drilling resistance in Tuffeau de Maastricht and Lecce limestone samples. ([[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022, p. 30]])
